name: llm-toolkit-by-shawna
description: Enterprise-grade LLM agent toolkit with multi-tool orchestration

scripts.test:ci: jest --ci --coverage --maxWorkers=2 && npm run -w CLI test:ci && npm run -w SlashCommands test:ci
scripts.verify:all: npm run verify:vnext-scope && npm run check:ci && npm run type-check && npm run test:ci && npm run build && npm run startup:check
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:tools && npm run build:memory
scripts.build:tools: npm run -w Terminal build && npm run -w WebBrowser build && npm run -w Calculator build && npm run -w DocumentScraper build && npm run -w Clock build && npm run -w Browserless build && npm run -w AskUser build && npm run -w RAG build && npm run -w Skills build && npm run -w ECM build
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist coverage .biome-cache && npm run clean:tools
scripts.clean:tools: npm run -w Terminal clean && npm run -w WebBrowser clean && npm run -w Calculator clean && npm run -w DocumentScraper clean && npm run -w Clock clean && npm run -w Browserless clean && npm run -w AskUser clean && npm run -w RAG clean && npm run -w Skills clean && npm run -w ECM clean

author: Shawna Pakbin
